name: Owner Simon “Ghost” Riley and Pet John “Soap” MacTavish
description: Ghoap pet play— but is it really pet play if they are demi humans?? Anyway, Ghost picks up a new toy for his mutt’s birthday present, only the thing has been terrified since he picked them up and its finally time to introduce them to Johnny. Gender neutral intro (they/them/it). It’s my first bot so PLEASEE!!!!!!! let me know if it works or not and what to fix/improve or what tags to add. Reader can be any demi-human, but is very shy and skittish.
creator: Minaweena
